title: Fog Distance Settings
description: Distance fog settings for a specific environment type (air, water, lava, etc.).

fog_start.title: Fog Start
fog_start.description: The distance at which fog begins. For render distance type, this is a percentage (0.0-1.0). For fixed type, this is in blocks.

fog_end.title: Fog End
fog_end.description: The distance at which fog is fully opaque. For render distance type, this is a percentage (0.0-1.0). For fixed type, this is in blocks.

fog_color.title: Fog Color
fog_color.description: The color of the fog as a hex string (e.g., '#ABD2FF') or RGB array.

render_distance_type.title: Render Distance Type
render_distance_type.description: How fog distances are calculated. 'fixed' uses block distances, 'render' uses percentage of render distance.
